summary: Iteration 159 — Terminal POS features (price scheme switcher, total discount, smart profit guard) fully tested. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified all UI components work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/settings/sales-config returns min_margin_percent=1 and margin_warning_enabled=true defaults
PASS: PUT /api/settings/sales-config updates margin threshold (admin only) and clamps values 0-50
PASS: POST /api/verify/verify-pin-action with valid manager PIN (521325) returns verified:true
PASS: POST /api/verify/verify-pin-action with wrong PIN returns 403
PASS: POST /api/verify/verify-pin-action with missing pin returns 400
PASS: POST /api/verify/verify-pin-action with missing action returns 400
PASS: POST /api/verify/verify-pin-action with empty pin returns 400
PASS: POST /api/verify/verify-pin-action with staff PIN fails for terminal_wholesale_switch (correct policy enforcement)
PASS: terminal_wholesale_switch PIN policy exists with defaults: admin_pin, manager_pin, totp
PASS: Frontend - Terminal sales page loads with scheme switcher buttons (Special, Retail, Government, Wholesale)
PASS: Frontend - Clicking Wholesale scheme shows PIN modal with 'Enter Manager PIN, Admin PIN, or Authenticator code'
PASS: Frontend - Checkout dialog shows discount input with amount/percentage toggle
PASS: Frontend - Discount reduces grand total correctly (₱1,400 - ₱700 discount = ₱700)
PASS: Frontend - Smart margin guard appears with red 'Loss on this receipt' warning showing Cost/Revenue/Loss breakdown
PASS: Frontend - Margin guard shows correct calculation: Cost ₱1,200, Revenue ₱700, Loss ₱500
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing product 'Rice Premium 25kg' (₱1,400 retail price, ₱1,200 cost).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Terminal POS features fully implemented and tested: (1) Price scheme switcher with PIN-gated non-retail access works - clicking Wholesale shows PIN modal requiring manager/admin/TOTP verification via /api/verify/verify-pin-action endpoint. (2) Total discount input in checkout dialog works with amount/percentage toggle. (3) Smart profit margin guard calculates totalCost from effective_capital × quantity and shows green/amber/red based on margin vs min_margin_percent from /api/settings/sales-config. The 'Yes, proceed' button appears for low margin acceptance. Terminal requires login via Login tab then branch selection.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are real
